label: Markets
description: Filterable prediction market grid with category, venue, sort, and search via FilterBar.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements: ['predictions-trading'] set. 0.3: availableOn: ['predictions'] set. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore (the `as Record<string, string | undefined>` cast on marketsFilterValues is a type narrowing for FilterBar prop — not an any). 0.5: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file — all data via usePredictionsData(). 0.6: isLoading guard added (context is synchronous/mock so always false; ready for wiring). 0.7: Empty state present — Card with Search icon and 'No markets found' when filteredMarkets.length === 0. 0.8: error guard added. 0.9: No dead code.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. 0.1: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements: ['predictions-trading'] set. 0.3: availableOn: ['predictions'] set. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore (the `as Record<string, string | undefined>` cast on marketsFilterValues is a type narrowing for FilterBar prop — not an any). 0.5: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file — all data via usePredictionsData(). 0.6: isLoading guard added (context is synchronous/mock so always false; ready for wiring). 0.7: Empty state present — Card with Search icon and 'No markets found' when filteredMarkets.length === 0. 0.8: error guard added. 0.9: No dead code.

1.1.note: Widget reads filteredMarkets, marketsFilterDefs, marketsFilterValues, handleMarketsFilterChange, resetMarketsFilters exclusively via usePredictionsData() — no inline fetch or direct import. 1.2: predictions-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() and derives scopeStrategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope(). 1.3: Market catalogue is global across orgs (prediction markets are not org-scoped instruments). Scope filtering applies to positions. 1.4: clientIds not wired into predictions context — same open gap as other domains. 1.5: Strategy filter N/A for market catalogue display. 1.6: Empty scope returns full market catalogue. 1.7: Category/venue/sort options (CATEGORY_OPTIONS, SORT_OPTIONS) are defined in the context file — appropriate location for domain filter options.

Scope filtering applies to positions. 1.4: clientIds not wired into predictions context — same open gap as other domains. 1.5: Strategy filter N/A for market catalogue display. 1.6: Empty scope returns full market catalogue. 1.7: Category/venue/sort options (CATEGORY_OPTIONS, SORT_OPTIONS) are defined in the context file — appropriate location for domain filter options.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

findings.description: 0.6/0.8 — No loading or error guard. Added isLoading/error stubs following established DeFi context pattern.
